message:
chore: add supply-chain hardening dependencies + fcp-registry to workspace

Workspace configuration updates:
- Add fcp-registry to workspace members and default-members
- Add fcp-registry path dependency for internal crate resolution

Supply-chain hardening dependencies for fcp-registry:
- tough 0.21.0: TUF (The Update Framework) implementation for secure
  software distribution, used for Sigstore trust root verification
- sigstore 0.13.0: Keyless signing verification (Cosign signatures,
  Rekor transparency log, Fulcio CA integration)
  Features: cosign, verify, rekor, sigstore-trust-root, rustls-tls
- sigstore-trust-root 0.4.0: Sigstore TUF root of trust management
  Feature: tuf for automatic trust root updates
- url 2.5: URL parsing for registry endpoint handling

These dependencies enable:
- Verification of connector manifests signed with ephemeral (keyless)
  certificates via Sigstore/Fulcio
- Transparency log inclusion proof verification via Rekor
- Trust root bootstrapping via TUF without hardcoded keys
- Secure update delivery for the trust root itself

Cargo.lock updated with transitive dependencies for the above.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
